## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue)

## Description
A clear and concise description of the changes you've made.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the `10_SecurityGuidelines.md` and `05_DRD.md`.
- [ ] My code follows the clean architecture guidelines.
- [ ] I have written unit tests for the changes.
- [ ] All CI checks pass locally.
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets have been committed.
